data.title: GREEN: Add Phase 5 migration invocation to update-artifacts.sh
data.description: Add '── 5. Brainstorm tag migration ──' section to update-artifacts.sh after Phase 4. Phase 5 calls: bash "$_SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh" --target "$_TARGET" --repo-root "$_EFFECTIVE_PLUGIN_ROOT" 2>&1 >&2 || { echo '[update-artifacts] Migration warning: brainstorm tag migration exited non-zero — see stderr for details' >&2; }. Error-tolerant: migration non-zero exits log a warning but do not change update-artifacts.sh exit code. Comment in code: 'best-effort — migration failure never fails artifact update'. testing_mode: GREEN
